assessment.note: Mentoring still feels useful, which adds a small growth-positive signal; it also introduces a concrete mentoring thread worth following.

new_queue.label: Mentoring useful
new_queue.name: What makes mentoring feel useful for you right now?
new_queue.description: Drills into why mentoring still feels worthwhile and what need it is meeting.

new_queue.label: Next-step picture
new_queue.name: What concrete path forward feels real to you right now?
new_queue.description: Gets at whether he sees a believable next move or only vague momentum.

new_queue.label: Support needed
new_queue.name: What would help make the next couple of weeks steadier for you?
new_queue.description: Ends by moving toward support and near-term stabilization without introducing a new thread.
